record.field: How long does ERP implementation take?
Implementation time varies depending on business size, but typically ranges from a few weeks to a few months.
Can the ERP integrate with my existing tools?
Yes, our ERP supports integrations with major third-party applications.
Do you provide training?
Absolutely! We provide hands-on training and continuous support to your team.
What are CRM Solutions?

CRM solutions are software systems designed to help businesses manage customer relationships, sales processes, and communication from a centralized platform. By organizing customer data, tracking leads and opportunities, and automating sales activities, CRM solutions help businesses improve customer engagement, increase sales efficiency, and build long-term customer relationships.
Why does my business need CRM Services?

CRM Services help businesses to manage customer interactions more efficiently by centralizing customer information, automating sales processes, and improving communication between teams. This leads to better customer experiences and improved sales performance.
How long does CRM implementation take?

The implementation timeline depends on the complexity of the project, required customization, integrations, and data migration. Small CRM projects may take a few weeks, while larger implementations can take several months.
How much does CRM implementation cost?

CRM implementation costs vary based on business size, customization, integrations, and training requirements. Costs may include setup, data migration, integration, and user training in addition to the CRM software subscription.
Can CRM be customized for my business processes?
Yes, CRM systems can be customized with custom fields, workflows, dashboards, and automation rules to match your business processes and reporting needs.
Can CRM integrate with other business tools?
Yes, CRM systems can integrate with tools such as ERP systems, marketing platforms, email services, accounting software, and customer support systems to create a connected business workflow.
How do you migrate data into a CRM system?
During CRM implementation, existing customer data from spreadsheets, legacy systems, or other software is cleaned, mapped, and securely migrated into the CRM to ensure accuracy and consistency.
Do you provide CRM support after implementation?
Yes, CRM support includes system maintenance, troubleshooting, updates, and continuous optimization to ensure the CRM platform continues to deliver value to the business.
What is a POS Solution?

A POS solution is a combination of software and hardware that allows businesses to process sales and streamline daily operations. It acts as the central hub where transactions happen and business data is recorded in real time.
Why POS Solutions?

POS (Point of Sale) solutions are essential for businesses to Simplify sales operations, improve efficiency, and enhance customer experience. They automate billing, track inventory in real time, and manage customer data from a single system, reducing manual work and errors. With a POS solution, businesses can process transactions faster, accept multiple payment methods, and gain valuable insights through detailed sales reports and analytics.
Do you sell or support POS hardware?

No. Creyox is a software and services company only. We deliver 100% Odoo-based POS software, configuration, integration, and ongoing support. We do not sell, supply, or repair any hardware. You can independently source your preferred devices and we will configure the Odoo POS software to work with them.
Can your POS software integrate with my inventory and accounting system?

Yes. Our POS integration solutions are built on Odoo, which natively connects POS with inventory, accounting, CRM, and e-commerce. If you use a third-party system, our POS software integration services bridge the gap via Odoo's API framework with no manual data entry required.
Do you offer POS solutions for small businesses?

Absolutely. We have dedicated Odoo POS packages for single-store and growing businesses, affordable cloud plans, simplified onboarding, and the full software feature set without an enterprise price tag. Many clients start small and scale to multiple locations on the same Odoo setup.
What does your POS setup and configuration service include?

Our POS setup service covers the complete Odoo POS software configuration product and category setup, pricing rules, tax configuration, payment method setup, user roles, session settings, and staff software training. We also provide post-go-live support to ensure smooth adoption.
Does Odoo POS work without an internet connection?

Yes. Odoo POS includes a built-in offline mode in the software. Transactions are stored locally in the browser session and automatically synchronised to the cloud when your connection returns. You never lose a sale due to a network outage
Can I manage multiple store locations from one Odoo POS system?

Yes. Our cloud POS solutions let you monitor sales, inventory, and staff across all locations from a single Odoo dashboard. Each location can have its own software configuration, separate pricing, products, tax rules, and user roles all managed centrally.
What makes you different from a regular web development company?

We are an Odoo certified partner not a generic web agency. Every website we build is developed on the Odoo framework, which means it connects natively to your CRM, inventory, accounting, and marketing. You get a business platform, not just a website.
Do you only build websites on Odoo, or do you work with other platforms?
Our primary expertise and strongest offering is Odoo website development. We specialise in Odoo because it delivers capabilities no other CMS can match for businesses already on or moving to Odoo.
What is included in your Odoo eCommerce website development service?

Our Odoo eCommerce development service covers full store design and configuration, product catalogue setup, payment gateway integration, inventory sync, checkout flow, shipping configuration, and post-launch support. Every eCommerce project includes full testing across devices before go-live.
Can you migrate our existing website or online store to Odoo?

Yes. We provide full migration services from platforms like WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento to Odoo website and eCommerce. This includes product and customer data migration, URL redirect mapping for SEO preservation, and full testing before the new site goes live.
How long does an Odoo website development project take?

A standard Odoo corporate website typically goes live in 3 to 4 weeks. An Odoo eCommerce development project with custom features typically takes 4 to 8 weeks depending on the product catalogue size and integration requirements. We provide a clear project timeline during the discovery phase.
Do you provide responsive websites?
Yes, all websites are fully responsive and mobile-friendly.
Will my Odoo website work on mobile devices?

Yes. Every website we develop is fully responsive designed and tested to perform correctly on desktop, tablet, and smartphone. Odoo's website builder is mobile-first by default, and we validate across real devices before launch.
Do you provide website maintenance after launch?

Yes. Our website development team offers post-launch maintenance like Odoo version updates, content changes, new page development, performance monitoring, security patches, and SEO health checks on an ongoing basis.
Do you provide ongoing support?
Yes, our team provides maintenance, updates, and performance monitoring.
What is Odoo integration?

Odoo integration refers to connecting the Odoo ERP platform with external systems, applications, and tools such as eCommerce stores, payment gateways, CRM platforms, logistics providers, and analytics tools so that data flows automatically between them without manual intervention.
Can you integrate Odoo with any platform?

In most cases, yes. If the platform has an open API REST, SOAP, or GraphQL we can integrate it with Odoo. For platforms without standard APIs, we assess custom middleware or file-based integration options during the discovery phase.
How long does an Odoo integration project take?

Pre-built connector deployments typically take 1–2 weeks. Custom Odoo API integration projects range from 3–8 weeks depending on complexity, the number of data flows, and testing requirements. We provide a clear timeline after the discovery phase.
Do you have pre-built integration connectors?

Yes. We have production-ready Odoo integration connectors for 3CX, TikTok Shop, Power BI, Google Sheets, Brevo, BigQuery, and more all available in the Odoo App Store under Creyox Technologies. These significantly reduce deployment time and cost.
Is our data secure during integration?

Absolutely. Every integration we build uses encrypted data transfer (HTTPS/TLS), proper API authentication (OAuth, API keys, tokens), and structured error handling so your data is always protected in transit and at rest.
Can you integrate Odoo with our legacy or custom system?

Yes. We specialise in bridging Odoo with legacy ERPs, custom-built platforms, and bespoke systems using middleware, custom APIs, or file-based data exchange depending on what your existing system supports.
Do you provide support after the integration goes live?

Yes. We offer dedicated post-launch support packages covering API update management, performance monitoring, error resolution, and connector maintenance so your integrations stay stable as platforms evolve and update their APIs.
Can you integrate Odoo with our eCommerce store?

Yes. We integrate Odoo with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, Amazon, eBay, TikTok Shop, and other commerce platforms syncing products, orders, inventory, customers, and returns in real time across all channels.
What is Odoo implementation?
Odoo implementation is the process of deploying and configuring the Odoo ERP platform to match your business workflows covering setup, customization, data migration, training, and support.
How long does the Odoo implementation process take?
Timelines vary by project scope. A small business implementation can take 4–8 weeks; mid-market projects typically run 3–5 months; complex enterprise rollouts may extend to 6–12 months.
Do you provide post-implementation support?
Yes. We offer structured post-go-live support plans covering monitoring, bug fixes, user queries, and regular system optimization.
Can you migrate data from our existing system?
Absolutely. We handle migration from any legacy ERP, accounting software, spreadsheets, or databases with full data validation and integrity checks.
Is Odoo implementation suitable for small businesses?
Yes. Odoo is particularly well-suited for small and growing businesses. We help small teams implement just what they need, with room to scale.
What makes Creyox different from other Odoo implementation companies?
We take a consultative, business-first approach. We don't just deploy software, we invest in understanding your operations and building an ERP that genuinely improves them.
